mnemonics.title: Containment Priority Levels
mnemonics.content: N-S-A-H-O (Network-System-Application-Host-Organizational) - Remember the containment hierarchy from broadest to most specific

mnemonics.title: Evidence Volatility Order
mnemonics.content: Rats Naturally Prefer Dessert (RAM-Network-Processes-Disk) - Remember the order of volatility for evidence collection
